summary: Full E2E testing of Scoliax landing page. Backend (8/8 pytest) and frontend flows all pass. Contact form submission successfully persists to MongoDB and emails are being sent via Resend (status 200, not 502 — domain appears accepting). French copy, sections, pricing, mobile menu all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L137: on Resend failure the endpoint raises 502 even though Mongo persistence already succeeded — client cannot distinguish 'stored but email failed' from 'totally failed'. Consider returning 200 with status='stored_email_failed' or include the submission id in 502 detail so users know their message was saved.

server.py L111-112: Mongo insert failure is swallowed (only logged) — endpoint will then attempt email and may return 200 success even though nothing was persisted. Should re-raise or return a proper error.
server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; prefer lifespan handlers.
No rate-limiting on /api/contact — public endpoint susceptible to spam/abuse.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject; fine for dev but tighten in prod.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned TEST_-prefixed contact submissions in MongoDB collection contact_submissions (auto-deleted via session-scoped fixture).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_scoliax_backend.py covers health + contact (validation + persistence with/without company). Tests use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL public URL and MongoDB via MONGO_URL. Resend currently returns 200 (email accepted) — note the spec anticipated possible 502, both are handled in tests.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — implementation matches spec.
